response.overview: Audio commentary – with Director Paul Weitz, Producer Chris Weitz, Writer Adam Herz and Cast Members Jason Biggs, Seann William Scott and Eddie Kaye Thomas (legacy) Return to Great Falls: Filming American Pie - An Interview with Cinematographer Richard Crudo (13 mins, NEW) Like warm apple pie: Scoring American Pie - An Interview with Composer David Lawrence (11 mins, NEW) Deleted Scenes (6 mins, legacy) Casting the Gang (4 mins, legacy) Outtakes (3 mins, legacy) Spotlight on Location – vintage EPK (11 mins, legacy) From the Set: Photographic Montage with Director and Producer Comments (7 mins, legacy) Tonic “You Wanted More” Music Video (5 mins, legacy) Tonic Live Performance (11 mins, legacy) Theatrical Trailer Productions Stills Gallery (8 mins, legacy) Also included in the release:  O-Ring with new artwork by Tommy Pocket Rigid slipcase with classic poster artwork 40-page perfect bound book of cast and crew stills and BTS photos
response.title: American Pie Bonus Disc
